reason: All prior log entries were from crypto/XRP runs and are no longer relevant to the active strategy.

strategy.name: 1-Minute Options Scalper
strategy.instrument: ATM CALL (bullish) or ATM PUT (bearish) — 0DTE or next weekly expiry

watchlist.note: VIX is a regime filter — not a tradeable symbol in this strategy

indicators_confirmed.rsi_14: Trade only when RSI is between 35 and 65
indicators_confirmed.vwap: Price above VWAP = CALL bias | Price below VWAP = PUT bias
indicators_confirmed.volume: Current bar must exceed 20-bar average volume
indicators_confirmed.price_momentum: Minimum 0.10% candle move required to trigger signal

vix_regimes_confirmed.30_to_40: High — 25% size, 1 trade max, AMZN/MSFT only

entry_rules_confirmed.call: Momentum up ≥ 0.10% + RSI 35–65 + price above VWAP + volume above avg → Buy ATM CALL
entry_rules_confirmed.put: Momentum down ≥ 0.10% + RSI 35–65 + price below VWAP + volume above avg → Buy ATM PUT

exit_rules_confirmed.stop_loss: -15% on premium (-20% when VIX is elevated)
exit_rules_confirmed.hard_close: All positions closed by 3:30 PM EST

market_hours_confirmed.no_trade_events: Within 30 min of earnings, FOMC, or CPI

symbol_notes.MU: Good options volume. Check earnings calendar.
symbol_notes.AMZN: Mega-cap. Tight spreads. Preferred under high VIX.
symbol_notes.PLTR: Decent volume. Can gap — watch size.
symbol_notes.SOFI: Smaller cap. Wider spreads. Use reduced size.
symbol_notes.NFLX: High IV. Expensive premiums. Strong signal required.
symbol_notes.MSFT: Mega-cap. Tight spreads. Preferred under high VIX.
symbol_notes.APP: Fast mover. Honor the 5-min time stop strictly.
symbol_notes.AMD: High options volume. Strong intraday moves.
